title: monardella odoratissima subsp. obispoensis
intro: Monardella odoratissima subsp. obispoensis, also known as Purple Fairy Candles or Big Berry Monardella, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the coastal hills of central California. This plant is valued for its fragrance and medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Monardella odoratissima subsp. obispoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and support the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
